title: pelargonium × basiicum
intro: Pelargonium × basiicum, also known as Cape Geranium or Unguentum Levant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which have been used to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits of Pelargonium × basiicum include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive problems, making it a popular natural remedy for colds and flu. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
